'''Sony Corporation''' is a [[Wikipedia:Multinational corporation|multinational corporation]] that manufactures various home video, music, [[Star Wars video games|video gaming]] and audio equipment. Corporate headquarters are located in [[Wikipedia:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[Wikipedia:Japan|Japan]], and the [[Wikipedia:United States|US]] [[Wikipedia:subsidiary|subsidiary]], '''Sony Corporation of America''', is based in [[Wikipedia:New York City|New York City]].

'''Sony Online Entertainment''' (now Daybreak Games) is responsible for the company's development and maintenance of [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|massively multiplayer online role-playing games]] (MMORPGs). The company has released two ''[[Star Wars]]''–themed MMORPGs since [[2003]], ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']].

Sony has also produced the following video game consoles with ''Star Wars'' games:
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation (console)|PlayStation]]
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]]
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3||PlayStation 3]]
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PlayStation Portable]]
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 4|PlayStation 4]]
*[[Wikipedia:PlayStation 5|PlayStation 5]]
